memory.summary: I have a free afternoon but my term project is barely started and due Thursday. While leisure is tempting, the quick chore offers an easy win to address before tackling major work.
The trivial chore provided a quick win, but my term project remains critically behind schedule with only three days left.
Completing the trivial chore gave me a small boost, but it did not meaningfully reduce the critical pressure from my term project deadline.
The quick win from the chore was satisfying, yet my term project remains critically behind schedule with only three days left.
My recent work advanced the term project slightly, but I now realize that every hour spent on it significantly reduces future stress and prevents last-minute crunch.
Completing the trivial chore provided a small progress boost and satisfaction, yet it failed to alleviate the critical pressure from my term project deadline.
Completing the trivial chore gave a small satisfaction boost, but it did not reduce the critical pressure from my term project deadline.
The trivial chore offered a minor satisfaction boost, but it failed to address the critical pressure from my term project deadline.
The trivial chore yielded a minor progress gain and temporary satisfaction, but it remains insufficient to resolve the critical pressure from my term project deadline.
Spending time on the trivial chore provided only a small satisfaction boost while the critical term project deadline pressure remains unresolved and intensifies.
Spending 0.5 hours on the trivial chore increased progress slightly but failed to alleviate the critical pressure from my term project deadline.
The trivial chore deadline has passed unfinished, confirming that this low-value task is no longer an option while the critical term project pressure remains unresolved.

goals.rationale: The project is due in 3 days with only ~29% progress. This requires immediate attention to avoid last-minute rushing, making it the primary long-term objective.
